scripts.build: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run build -w @gamepulse/desktop && npm run build -w @gamepulse/mobile && npm run build -w @gamepulse/userscript
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run build -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run dev -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run dist -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:windows: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run dist:windows -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:windows:dir: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run dist:windows:dir -w @gamepulse/desktop
scripts.test: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @gamepulse/ui && npm run build -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/shared && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/desktop && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/mobile && npm run typecheck -w @gamepulse/userscript
